prediction.reasoning: Based on typical semiconductor stock volatility patterns, AMD exhibits daily price movements with standard deviation around 3-4%. Over 6 trading days, cumulative volatility increases. The point estimate assumes no directional bias in efficient markets. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution with annualized volatility of approximately 55-60% typical for AMD, scaled to 6-day horizon.
